questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to TCP Connection?
options: Inefficient scaling of Three-way handshake, sequence numbers synchronization, and 4-step connection teardown.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Three-way handshake, sequence numbers synchronization, and 4-step connection teardown.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Three-way handshake, sequence numbers synchronization, and 4-step connection teardown scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
